top_signals.title: Citizen science in Japan’s Ogasawara Islands spotlights ties between ships and birds
top_signals.summary: A recent study has shed new light on seabirds' tendencies to follow ships near the island chain and highlights the role wildlife enthusiasts can play in research.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
